name: Beach by ocean
description: I'm in a Beach by ocean
hints: A beach with sand, a large stone head, and impenetrable jungle.
The stone head can be climbed for a view. The jungle blocks passage.
CLIM HEAD to get on top of the head and see an atoll offshore.
S=plain (7), E=palm beach (4), W=cliff beach (2), D=tidepool (5). CLIM HEAD=top (10).
notes: Starting room. Beach hub. Stone head climbable (room 10). S=plain (7), E=palm beach (4), W=cliff beach (2), D=tidepool (5).
